ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters for the model */,
  "preprocessing" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, test) */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score for the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the model */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score for the model */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score for the model */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used to evaluate the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to evaluate the model */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for classification models */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team name or ID that the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department name or ID that the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., train, evaluate, deploy) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results or outputs from the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_interactions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Deployment environment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
